name: NutriPure Beverages, Inc.
summary: NutriPure Beverages, Inc. focuses on operating in the healthy food/water industries. The company is developing a line of nutrient-enhanced bottled water products under the NU2O label. It also offers beverage formulation services; and management consulting services in beverage formulation. The company was formerly known as Liberty Diversified Holdings, Inc. and changed its name to NutriPure Beverages, Inc. in January, 2008. NutriPure Beverages, Inc. was incorporated in 1999 and is based in Newport Beach, California.
